metadata.description: Use Google Antigravity from Claude Code — run Gemini, Claude, or GPT-OSS models as a second opinion, review your diff, or delegate tasks. The agy counterpart to the codex plugin; drives agy via a synthesized console (node-pty).

plugins.name: agy
plugins.description: Second opinions, code review, and delegated tasks via the agy CLI — pick any model agy offers (Gemini / Claude / GPT-OSS).
